name: manim-lecture-generator
description: Turn one or more PDF lecture sources into finished narrated Manim lecture videos with local Kokoro TTS and layout validation.

interface.shortDescription: Generate narrated Manim videos from PDFs with local TTS.
interface.longDescription: Provides an end-to-end PDF-to-video workflow: source extraction, lecture planning, Manim scene generation, local Kokoro TTS narration, audio/video muxing, and render validation focused on keeping elements sized correctly and inside the frame.
defaultPrompt: Generate a finished narrated Manim video from the PDFs in this directory, with scene scripts, local Kokoro TTS, LaTeX math, and layout validation.
Create a multi-video Manim course outline from these PDFs and implement the first lecture.
Extract the attached PDF into a rigorous Manim lecture plan with synchronized voiceover timing.
